Name: MAP_OBJECT_BREAK_ACTION_PARAM
Description: Defines which player movement or action states are capable of breaking destructible map objects.

Fields.Name: Breakable While Strafing
Fields.Description: Determines whether the object can be broken while the player is moving sideways.

Fields.Name: Breakable While Walking
Fields.Description: Determines whether the object can be broken while the player is walking.

Fields.Name: Breakable While Dashing
Fields.Description: Determines whether the object can be broken while the player is dashing or sprinting.

Fields.Name: Breakable While Rolling
Fields.Description: Determines whether the object can be broken during an evasive roll.

Fields.Name: Breakable While Jumping
Fields.Description: Determines whether the object can be broken while the player is jumping.

Fields.Name: Breakable While Falling
Fields.Description: Determines whether the object can be broken by falling onto it.

Fields.Name: Breakable While Taking Damage
Fields.Description: Determines whether the object can be broken while the player is in a damaged or staggered state.

Fields.Name: Breakable While Attacking
Fields.Description: Determines whether the object can be broken during attack actions.

Fields.Name: Breakable During Plunging Attack
Fields.Description: Determines whether the object can be broken during a falling or plunging attack.
